itemName.zh: 奈特军械公司 (KAC) SR-25 7.62x51 精确射手步枪
itemName.en: Knight's Armament Company SR-25 7.62x51 marksman rifle

description.zh: 你在村庄发现的东西非常有趣，看起来像是某种神秘教派。我之前听到过传言，有一群人近似疯狂地在鼓吹灾难即将来临的消息。现在，他们经常向他们的神献祭，你认为他们会献祭什么呢？——武器。目前尚不清楚他们从哪里搞来的，也不清楚接下来他们会做什么。我们只知道他们到处都有这样的祭坛。找到这些地方，并用指示器标记它们，我们将努力追踪这个组织的详细活动，看看他们到底有多“民主”。
description.en: What you have discovered in the village is very interesting, it looks like some kind of occult sect. I’ve heard rumors before that there is some group actively spreading the news of approaching cataclysm and that kind of hysteria. Now, they often make sacrifices to their gods, and what would you think they offer as sacrifice? Weapons. It is not clear where they take it from or what they do in the rest of their time. We only know that they have several such sacrificial altars everywhere. Find them and mark with beacons, and we will try to trace the activities of this organization in detail, to learn how much democracy they have.
